narrative:
North Canton 2-C (precinct in Stark County) has 836 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
